title: Amortized operator for instant personalization
expected_band: trained once on a simulated patient population, the operator maps a new patient's sparse activation times in one forward pass to a calibrated posterior over the tissue parameters (conduction velocity and substrate location), at a large speedup over a per-patient fit

ladder.classical: per-patient inverse fit repeated from scratch for every patient (minutes each)
ladder.sota: geometry-independent neural operators for cardiac EP (DeepONet-ViT, kernel operator learning)
ladder.novel: amortized inference: one operator over a simulated population returns a CALIBRATED parameter posterior in one pass, no per-patient refit

engine.model: amortized heteroscedastic operator over a simulated Eikonal population -> calibrated parameter posterior; recalibrated UQ

reasons: not web-drivable (input is not a browser-suppliable coordinate/parameter)

references.cite: A unified framework for geometry-independent operator learning in cardiac electrophysiology (2025)
references.note: DeepONet-ViT / operator-learning SOTA for cardiac EP

references.cite: Kissas, Seidman, Perdikaris (2022). Learning operators with coupled attention. JMLR 23
